Package org.episteme.social.history.archeology

package org.episteme.social.history.archeology
Provides classes and interfaces for archaeological research and analysis. Includes models for excavation sites, artifacts, civilizations, and stratigraphic sequences.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.episteme.social.history
    - historical events, timelines, and chronology.
    org.episteme.social.history.calendars
    Historical and alternate calendar systems for chronological calculations.
    org.episteme.social.history.clock
    Provides the org.episteme.social.history.time module.
    org.episteme.social.history.loaders
     
    org.episteme.social.history.time
    Temporal coordinate and interval support for historical analysis.
  • Class
    Description
    ArcheologyConstants
    Constants useful for archaeology and geological time scales.
    Civilization
    Represents a civilization, modeled as a culture distributed through space and time.
    Item
    Represents an archaeological item (fossil, artifact, etc.) found at a site.
    Site
    Represents an archaeological field site.
    Site.Item
    Inner class representing a discovered item.
    StratigraphyModel
    Models archaeological stratigraphy and topological relationships between strata.
    StratigraphyModel.Relationship
    Topographic relationship between stratigraphic units.
    Stratum
    A distinct layer or unit of context in a stratigraphic sequence.
